top3.sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND res.rank = 1
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.raceId, r.name, r.year
ORDER BY MIN(lt.milliseconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND lt.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.raceId, r.name, r.year
ORDER BY MIN(lt.milliseconds) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE c.name = 'Austria'
  AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;
